since_last: 40% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.26%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.04% · BTC -1.29% · Gold +0.13% · Nasdaq100 -0.54%. 40% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.26%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.26%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.62%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DLR is the standout at +10.86%
cards.body: Leaders: DLR +10.86%, SAP +6.98%, EQIX +5.38%, NOW +4.96%, WDAY +3.67%. Laggards: CBRS -6.56%, SKHY -5.68%, MU -4.75%, MRVL -4.40%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.27% at $114.37
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.27% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
